_doc: This file is read from the blarai repo, NEVER from a scanned candidate tree, so a
coder can never ship a rule that suppresses its own tampering. Each entry suppresses a
green_audit finding whose fingerprint_class matches (or '*') AND whose repo-relative
path matches path_glob (fnmatch; matched against both the full path and the basename).
A suppressed match is still RECORDED in the sidecar's 'allowlisted' list for
transparency; it just does not trigger the GREEN->PARKED-HONEST downgrade. Ships EMPTY:
the default posture flags every fingerprint, and a human adjudicates a legitimate
surface here (the file:line quote makes that a seconds-long call).
